case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. ARMEN ALAVERDYAN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT ALAVERDYAN, ARMEN DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-17-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-13-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-02-2009
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-03-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-17-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-03-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
